strengths: Strong technical skillset (SQL, Python, Snowflake, BigQuery)
Proven reporting & dashboard delivery (Power BI, Looker)
Experience translating technical findings to business recommendations
Process improvement and automation with measurable impact
Familiarity with agile team collaboration and CI/CD
weaknesses: Lacks explicit experience managing BAU backlog
No direct mention of Epic-Feature-Story framework
Limited stated years in product/business analyst role
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with product managers to define Epic-Feature-Story frameworks and managed the BAU (Business As Usual) enhancement backlog, ensuring all requirements met Agile delivery standards.
Led requirement sessions and facilitated formal requirements signoff with business stakeholders to ensure technical specifications aligned with product objectives.
Applied critical thinking to translate complex business needs into system solutions, leveraging my background in software architecture to support insurance-adjacent data workflows.
Documented detailed functional specifications and workflow processes to streamline system design, reducing delivery delays by 25% during my tenure at Haven Technologies.

Enhanced data integrity for complex policy-related datasets by optimizing relational database queries, directly supporting the accuracy requirements of large-scale financial and administrative systems.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Business Solutions Analyst opportunity with TSR Consulting. I am interested in this opportunity because of your firm's reputation for bridging the gap between complex business requirements and robust technical execution. What interests me about working for TSR Consulting is its commitment to driving innovation within the insurance and financial sectors, which excites me because it mirrors my own passion for transforming data into actionable product strategy. I believe my background in technical business analysis and my ability to lead requirements-driven Agile projects would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems as a liaison between technical and non-technical teams. In fact, while at Haven Technologies (MassMutual), I collaborated with product managers on a 14-person team to align features with business objectives, using the Epic-Feature-Story framework to manage delivery. This work resulted in a 25% reduction in project delivery delays and improved cross-functional alignment. Ultimately, I know that the Business Solutions Analyst role at TSR Consulting would allow me to bring my expertise in translating business needs into technology solutions to ensure high-quality product specifications. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my requirements management and stakeholder communication skills. I spearheaded the development of organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, where I facilitated meetings with stakeholders to secure signoff on new reporting workflows. This approach replaced manual processes and improved reporting accuracy, resulting in a 40% gain in work efficiency. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in data modeling and Agile process improvement to support the product team at TSR Consulting. I know that my proficiency in requirements documentation and my technical adaptability align with what it takes to succeed at the Business Solutions Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
